name: io.github.zyx77550/sparda-mcp
title: SPARDA
description: Compile backends to behavior graphs. Statically prove security, simulate APIs, and replay bugs.

packageArguments.description: Start the stdio MCP bridge. Requires `sparda init` to have been run in the working directory first.

environmentVariables.name: SPARDA_FLYWHEEL
environmentVariables.description: Set to `off` to disable serving proven-stable reads from memory (organs keep learning).

environmentVariables.name: SPARDA_RECORD_SEQUENCES
environmentVariables.description: Set to `1` to enable Labs circuit recording (crystallizes repeated tool chains into composite tools).
